title: AfkDisconnect
description: A mod that disconnects you when your going to die when afk. configurable.
body:
# Disconnecting
![Disconnect Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748d324475331d7bb42638f757a35aadd78c245f_0.webp)
Configurable for different health values to disconnect at. 20 is not reccomended cause it'll kick you the moment you get marked as afk. 
# Configuring
![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e03cbfb6fe4583f056f58834cc94903453c9d73_0.webp)
You can set the time for you to be marked afk after, and pressing "G" will toggle it on and off, as well as 

```
/afkdisconnect activate
```

and 

```
/afkdisconnect deactivate
```

To toggle. It is automatically toggled off when disconnected from a server, to prevent infinite loop bugs. Please Send me any bugs you find at **TheRealNoob1239@outlook.com **
